guys, awesome job with Spyder 4! I'm really loving it!

This is a minor issue but a bit annoying so I'm gonna post it so it's out there (it was also the same in Spyder3).

When I defocus Spyder (say to search for some Python code in Firefox) and then I scroll down my code in the Editor and click on it, the Editor jumps back to the last cursor position and not where I clicked.

This also happens if you scroll the Editor then defocus and then click.
